ab: maeae ko mwali gako ka ’iyasolodrane kake.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: ko mwali gako ka, maymo kake wamece na kabange.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.
I didn’t bring anything with me.

ab: ko solatiname ka, ’angiese kake ko sito cengele na solate.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: ko sikingi name ka, ko soi’aniname ka kyasedame nakowa ko ’ipicili si sadrisdrisili.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: ki singsi name ka ’apobaka "nakowa, ’anobilanenga ka, adri’isolodranenga!"
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, “Wake up earlier next time and don’t be late again!”
